name: Weather Lookup
description: Use this tool for weather, rain, umbrella, temperature, hot, cold, forecast, city, tonight, tomorrow, weekend, and morning questions.

name: Travel Booking
description: Use this tool for flight, train, hotel, ticket, destination, trip, station, nights, and booking requests.

name: Calculator
description: Use this tool for calculate, add, times, convert, miles, kilometers, percent, tip, bill, and other arithmetic problems.

name: Document Assistant
description: Use this tool for summarize, bullet points, extract action items, rewrite email, notes, paragraph, and text editing tasks.

name: Market Data
description: Use this tool for stock, Tesla, Apple, Bitcoin, crypto, price, closing price, market, and performance questions.

name: Calendar Scheduler
description: Use this tool for alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, move, next Tuesday, next Monday, and calendar event requests.
